guardrails.note: Read-only first coverage launch pack. It selects one unique human-review candidate for each broad AI cluster with zero public coverage and never edits articles or changes review/publish state.
guardrails.stopBefore: Stop before mark:review and publish. Human approval is required for every selected file.

demandBriefGuardrails.note: Read-only broad AI demand brief. It prioritizes likely search-demand themes from local inventory plus external source signals, but does not claim measured traffic or keyword volume.

freshnessTriageGuardrails.note: Read-only broad freshness triage. It prioritizes high-demand AI draft candidates for human fact-checking and does not edit, mark review, publish, or claim traffic.
freshnessTriageGuardrails.stopBefore: Stop before mark:review and publish. Human approval is required for every file.

publicSurfaceGuardrails.note: Read-only public surface inventory. It lists currently public content and broad AI demand gaps without editing articles or claiming traffic.

sourceEvidence.trafficNote: Search queries and cluster gap scores are editorial planning signals, not measured keyword volume, rankings, impressions, clicks, traffic, or revenue.
